description_long: This is a large, modern residential house with a flat roof and a boxy, geometric design. The exterior is predominantly light-colored, with numerous rectangular windows of varying sizes distributed across all sides. The house is surrounded by a low perimeter wall and features a paved area that could serve as a driveway or courtyard. Sparse landscaping is present, with a few small trees or shrubs near the building. The structure appears to have multiple stories, with rooftop access and several balconies or terraces visible.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat roof, light exterior, and numerous rectangular windows, surrounded by a low wall and minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the house with a prominent entryway, several windows, and a paved area leading up to the building.
description_view_1: This view highlights the rear or side facade with a large expanse of windows and a wide paved area, as well as a small cluster of trees.
description_view_2: This view displays the back of the house, which has fewer windows and a more solid wall appearance, with a corner of the yard visible.
description_view_3: This view presents another side of the house with a garage-like structure, multiple windows, and the perimeter wall enclosing the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple recessed entry with a flat overhang, minimal steps, and no decorative columns.
